input.background: A trial tests a treatment at two separate clinics. Upon completion of the study, cross tabulation of results from both clinics combined is provided.
input.question: The incidence proportion of success in the treatment group $\hat{p}_1=1095 / 10,100=11 \%$. The incidence proportion in the control group $\hat{p}_2=5050 / 11,100=46 \%$. Therefore, the relative incidence.

treatment_success_count.description: Number of successes in the treatment group.

treatment_total_count.description: Total number of participants in the treatment group.

control_success_count.description: Number of successes in the control group.

control_total_count.description: Total number of participants in the control group.

incidence_proportion_treatment.description: Incidence proportion of success in the treatment group.

incidence_proportion_control.description: Incidence proportion of success in the control group.
